# banner-and-css

ui.cssurl, banner*, loginButtonText round-trip

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/ui/banner-and-css` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  ui.cssurl: https://example.com/custom.css
  ui.bannercontent: Welcome
  ui.bannerurl: https://example.com/banner
  ui.bannerpermanent: "true"
  ui.bannerposition: top
  ui.loginButtonText: Sign in
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    ui:
      banner:
        content: Welcome
        permanent: true
        position: top
        url: https://example.com/banner
      cssURL: https://example.com/custom.css
      loginButtonText: Sign in
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  ui.bannercontent: Welcome
  ui.bannerpermanent: "true"
  ui.bannerposition: top
  ui.bannerurl: https://example.com/banner
  ui.cssurl: https://example.com/custom.css
  ui.loginButtonText: Sign in
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
